name: TouchRipple

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The content the ripple overlays — the ripple host wraps this and spawns ripple spans on pointer-down over it.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Color of the ripple. Default: currentColor.

parameters.name: Opacity
parameters.description: Peak opacity of the ripple as it expands. Default: 0.25.

parameters.name: DurationMs
parameters.description: Duration of the ripple expand/fade animation in milliseconds, and how long its DOM node stays mounted before removal. Negative values are clamped to 0. Default: 500.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the ripple host div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the ripple host div.

examples.title: Custom Color
examples.code:
<TouchRipple Color="#3b82f6" Class="inline-block rounded-md">
    <Button Variant="ButtonVariant.Secondary">Blue ripple</Button>
</TouchRipple>

<TouchRipple Color="#ef4444" Class="inline-block rounded-md">
    <Button Variant="ButtonVariant.Secondary">Red ripple</Button>
</TouchRipple>

examples.title: Custom Opacity and Duration
examples.code:
<!-- High opacity, fast -->
<TouchRipple Opacity="0.5" DurationMs="300" Class="inline-block rounded-md">
    <Button Variant="ButtonVariant.Outline">Fast (300 ms)</Button>
</TouchRipple>

<!-- Low opacity, slow -->
<TouchRipple Opacity="0.1" DurationMs="900" Class="inline-block rounded-md">
    <Button Variant="ButtonVariant.Outline">Slow (900 ms)</Button>
</TouchRipple>

examples.title: Ripple on a Card
examples.code:
<TouchRipple Class="block rounded-xl w-full max-w-sm cursor-pointer">
    <Card Class="p-5">
        <Text Class="font-medium">Interactive card</Text>
        <Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Tap anywhere to see the ripple.</Text>
    </Card>
</TouchRipple>

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The content the ripple overlays — the ripple host wraps this and spawns ripple spans on pointer-down over it.

mdSummary:
# TouchRipple

Touch Ripple component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/touch-ripple

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TouchRipple | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The content the ripple overlays — the ripple host wraps this and spawns ripple spans on pointer-down over it. |
| TouchRipple | Color | `string` | `"currentColor"` | Color of the ripple. Default: currentColor. |
| TouchRipple | Opacity | `double` | `0.25` | Peak opacity of the ripple as it expands. Default: 0.25. |
| TouchRipple | DurationMs | `int` | `500` | Duration of the ripple expand/fade animation in milliseconds, and how long its DOM node stays mounted before removal. Negative values are clamped to 0. Default: 500. |
| TouchRipple | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the ripple host div. |
| TouchRipple | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the ripple host div. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (TouchRipple) — The content the ripple overlays — the ripple host wraps this and spawns ripple spans on pointer-down over it.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Services)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<TouchRipple />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/TouchRipple/TouchRipple.razor`
